Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class ExtensionHelper

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.ExtensionHelper
public class ExtensionHelper extends Object
A class to help building extended formulae.

    Implementation of a predicate operator α carrying two children: one predicate, and one expression of an arbitrary type.

    Implementation of a generic operator with the same type profile as the generic identity operator.

  • Method Details

    • getAlphaExtension

      public static IPredicateExtension2 getAlphaExtension()
      Returns an extension defining a predicate operator α carrying two children: one predicate, and one expression of an arbitrary type.

      This operator can be used to build predicates of the form "α(a ∈ A, a)".

    • getGenericOperatorExtension

      public static IExpressionExtension getGenericOperatorExtension()
      Returns a generic operator with the same type profile as the generic identity operator.

      Example of usage: "f ◁ ▲".
